# F K Filter

**Summary**: An F-K (frequency-wavenumber) filter is used to remove specific types of noise, such as linear artifacts.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] applied a mild F-K filter to remove artifact liner noise from the stack section.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The F-K filter successfully removed artifact liner noise without affecting the primary P-wave reflection. ([[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024, p. 73]])
